notes: Estimated from a blend of: (1) Taman Kota Sri Ahmad Shah subsale market stats on List.my (555 transactions, median RM548k, median RM205 psf, typical range RM441k-RM655k); and (2) live Kuantan semi-D asking/auction comps that cluster around RM350k-RM470k for older/freehold single-storey semi-Ds, with premium KotaSAS auction semi-Ds at RM648k-RM800k. I adjusted downward versus the township median because the subject has a relatively small 1-1/2 storey built-up of 1,270 sq ft. Price per sq ft is computed on land area: RM490,000 / 3,025 sq ft ≈ RM162 psf. Confidence is medium because exact same-subtype live listings in the immediate Taman Kota Sri Ahmad Shah area are limited, so the estimate relies on nearby Kuantan freehold semi-D comps plus township-level subsale data.
